2026-06-23.text: Great experience. One thing that I do think would be a small yet effective addition would be something like folders where you can store your different chats into. For example, if you have several different chats of the same category under one character, it would make it much easier to organize everything with folders, and they wouldn't be jumbled up with other types of chats.

2026-06-24.text: honestly it's way too expensive. It has a really good user interface and it's very detailed but unless you're planning on spending hundreds of dollars it's worthless. like literally three messages are over a hundred gems. It's crazy. I've used the app for about 48 hours now and I've already spent almost $20 and I've barely gotten anywhere. I think I'm going to just cancel my plan and not use it again honestly.

2026-06-23.text: I downloaded this app with high hopes. I Uninstalled it 10 minutes later. I tried to interact with two different characters and all I got was "please wait.. they are getting ready to respond".. over and over and over.... just sit and wait for nothing to happen... Id rather watch ads than just sit there and wait. Total waste of space on my device. I figured Id favorite them and try again later but it wouldnt let me. It also seemed to lock up my device. So disappointed.

2026-04-13.text: After so long I've basically had enough. The ads have made it virtually unusable. It might be because I took off my phone case, which would still be dumb, but the X on ads just takes me to the app store, and when I come back from the app store, the chat I clicked on is gone, which is just great if I found a good chat I saw and didn't remember the name, since it doesn't save the chat if you click on it and get sent to the app store. The UI is getting worse and not as good as it's used to be.

2026-02-27.text: Y'know, it was fine for ads to pop up before chats. Nothing too bad, right? Well, now they're everywhere! No matter where you go, theres an ad. Now they pop up in the middle of your chats. Which is ANNOYING. It wont even go away unless you toss up some money or sit around every day getting charms. Its starting to get annoying, showing up everywhere you go. I get that things gotta have ads for money and such, but the old way they were shown in the app was better than how frequent we get them now.

2026-03-07.text: Editing my initial rating since the new update. I think the ads are too much. Before the new update, I thought the ads were tame enough to handle. It was just an occasional ad here and there, but ever since the new update, I've been getting nothing but ads after a few attempts to send a reply to the conversation I'm having. The fact that there used to be no ads is something I miss dearly, and even the occasional ads were tame enough to get by. Now it's not.

2026-02-26.text: This was my favorite app for role-playing with my favorite characters, I used to be borderline addicted to it. And while I understand that a free version needs ads to offset the cost of running such a platform BUT the ads now are getting WAY TOO AGGRESSIVE. Everytime you click a bot to talk to, a banner on top of your screen and then random forced ads while chatting? The subscription cost isn't really worth the "benefits" either but it's like you're going to bombard us with ads until we cave.

2026-03-17.text: Pretty disappointed. Been using this app consistently for the past 6-ish months and now I just keep getting bombarded by ads. I was fine with getting one sometimes when I'd change chats, but now there's an annoying banner at the top and you can only send a few messages until an ad pops up as you send your message. Not changing my rating even tho the devs simply suggested paying for no ads. Clearly doesn't fix the problem since their only solution is to throw money their way. I'm disgusted.

2025-08-06.text: This app is amazing, but there is one problem. Whenever I pasted something from my clip board, it would say I can't enter any more characters. Please remove the typing limit that's under whatever number it's set on and let me type my paragraphs in peace. Please c.ai. also, the search is becoming a problem where I search something up, and there's only 2 or 4 results when I know there's more results than that. please fix this :( [update:Remove the damn ads.)

2025-08-05.text: It's a chatbot alright. But please don't prioritize making stickers (a totally useless feature) over fixing bot messages freezing as they're being typed out. Having to restart the app and being forced to watch a video ad (many of which are more than a quick reasonable amount of time and I think some are an entire minute) because of a bug is really dumb and I'm just going to restart the app every time I get one that's more than 15 seconds or so long until I don't even get one because it's faster.

2025-10-15.text: when I first started on this app, I really enjoyed it. it helped me escape reality for a little while when I just needed. However, ever since all these changes, there have been too many ads, even with Character AI Plus. 2025-04-26.text: From the start, i had issues, getting kicked out, freezing up, etc.... now i can not even open the app, and if it does open, i cannot login. 2025-04-16.text: When I first downloaded the app it was amazing. now im paying 9.99 a month for c.ai for absolutely nothing. it crashes or doesnt load properly, the response time is the same as the free one, the filters make storytelling almost impossible. at this rate they are just stealing money from people who download this app. there is literally nothing worth while for their "upgraded" subscription. you are better off with another chat bot. would highly recommend looking into something else.

2024-12-18.text: This app is good because; One, no ads. Two, personas and infinite amounts of characters to talk to. And three, I can make my characters to talk to. But there are a lot of issues; One, the edit button is gone, and now I have to delete part of my conversation to rewrite it. Two, the filter is insane. Like, I understand that kids use this, but it is WAY too strict. Third, I would like if we could put apostrophes in the names of our personas, for Japanese characters and such.

2026-06-14.text: I'd been a long-time user of this app. It was one of my favorites. But now, recently, they've even put a cap on how far you can go in your chats. For the first time, I got a notification about reaching my 100 limit "go on" (story continuation button). It's no longer enjoyable and becoming impossible for free users when it used to be more immersive in the past. Not to mention, the story suggestions are no longer creative, just reiterations of the previous prompts.

2026-06-13.text: I've been using this for years. Updates and bug fixes to occur which is great—even if it takes a while sometimes. System crashes get fixed relatively quickly. My main complaint is that occasionally and at random, you will need to refresh the chat because it fails. You get an error message that says "Refresh Chat." I'm a plus member so this makes it a bit more frustrating. The paid version does give much better chats.

2026-06-15.text: this app started off good when I first used it, but now with the limited swipes I feel less inclined to want to use the app. along with how long ads are, I've had multiple times where my phone had turned off automatically from waiting so long for ads to end. I'm fine with ads, I know they are necessary but I feel the length is more than necessary. I do hope things will be changed, but for the meantime I am disappointed and put off by the app.

I've been around Character.AI since before it became an app as a whole, but lately I've been having several issues besides the advertisement. The updates thus far are unnecessary especially with the bots suddenly having a limit to how much they remember. I would've thought that the better memory would stay but now it's getting out of hand. Including saying that it's expensive to one-star reviews but no one wants this but the occasional individual.

Nice app, other then the constant ads, not to mention the memory limit, other then those main things, the people that make funny chats and amazing chats have real talent! But they need to stop the kinda mid memory :( I get it is expensive and all that, so I suppose the ads are needed.. Just, better memory please if you can! Not pushing! Because I find good chats but then when I get really into having fun, they just kind start to forget things....

2026-06-11.text: Literally unusable due to the sheer amount of ads, they cut off your chats to play an ad before you can continue. ads are at the top of the screen and every where, after nearly every ad it asks if you want to go ad free. 2026-06-12.text: Unusable now. The bots wont even respond anymore? I paid the monthly but $10 is way too much for the little benefits it gives. It just gets rid of the ads. 2026-05-28.text: I've used this app for years, now. Out of the many I've tried, it was always the best. It was ad free, no annoying currency, and overall enjoyable. Then, some ads popped up before chats. Okay. They're upgrading the bots, they need some money. Understandable. Then, ads during chats. Not ideal, but okay. Now, there's a limited number of refreshes on chats, and it's slowly becoming less and less free to play friendly. It's reaching a point, of alienating the free audience. You hate to see it

2026-05-29.text: Recently with the adverts being added, it isn't so bad. They're skippable and don't last long and you can almost always tell when you're going to get one. The most annoying part of the ads is the banner on the top. Also, when clicking out of an ad, if you accidentally misclick it exits out of the app completely and your message completely disappears. The worst thing lately is the repetitive nature of the bots. They have very little dialogue anymore, like the bot is forcing itself to say nothing.

2026-04-13.text: The bots are arguably smarter than the ones that CharacterAI has, but CharacterAI has more characters, and more free stuff, like the ability to change the bot's response which is sometimes stupid as hell, or the ability to delete and edit anything, not to mention it's just flexible all around. I got off of it though because it started blasting me with ads, and when I'd try to skip them, it would take me to the app store, so using a bot that would keep having an ad was impossible.

2025-09-27.text: this app is, in my opinion, one of the best. the only problem I have is that the "My Persona" program no longer works with any of the Ai characters after the last update. it's one of my favorite details on this app, and I'm really sad it's not working anymore. also, the ads are getting ridiculous. almost every time I leave a chat, or it says, "Take a break" I have to wait about a minute. to be fair, I get that ads help. but when ads open on top of other ads. 2025-07-13.text: Expensive. If you look the app has a fake discount that brings the price to 20 bucks but it's 100 bucks a month if you look without the discount. They basically make you feel like you have a discount to buy. Nothing more. 2025-02-15.text: Lots of scenarios to choose from, and having used this for 4 months now, ready to review. ADS. Every time you close a chat, or exit, ad. It is insane. I have mastered the art of closing the app and reopening every time I just try to change conversations and get an ad. Despite being my favorite AI chat, this is the worst offender of ads. Memory of them..kinda sucks. Some are good, but about half of them 4 messages in and they forget everything. Others I've been able to have ~100-500 messages.

2025-10-30.text: I've been using this app and chatting without any issues for over a year. Yes, there are ads and sometimes, the ads are excessive. (Like, excessively excessive.) But today, for the first time ever, I got the "Take a Break" popup. HORRIBLE change. I've actually been considering subscribing, but not anymore. Not if this is the new standard. Predatory practice on the developer's part. I get it, you like money. But don't you make enough?

2025-07-09.text: I'm getting more disappointed with every update that goes by. - Constant errors. Probably ~20 errors per conversation, always the same error: "Ai has had an error!", and then it has you reload your message. - Character personas suddenly being filtered when the app is meant to have no filters. - Keyboard covers up the typing area when creating a character, so you can't even check for typos unless if you want to close the keyboard and check.

2024-09-11.text: I find it odd that we have to pay coins to regenerate a response, especially if we're paying for a subscription. While the more costly of the two subscriptions gives you 1500 coins a month. If you do run out of, you would have to pay for more coin. Why couldn't it be the more costly one have unlimited regenerations, the less costly sub have a high limit, and the free have a small limit?

2024-09-06.text: Enjoyable conversations, & the ability to create your own stories with such a varying number of characters for almost every genre. I happily paid for the subscription to support the apps continued growth, but there doesn't seem to be a difference, from what I've experienced, in quality for the non-paying player outside of having to watch ads. Highly recommend! The only thing I would change is how often the characters displayed are refreshed. I feel like I often see many of the same one's.

2025-07-19.text: It was great a year ago, and now it horrible, I can't talk to a bot more than 30 times without getting an add, what happened to just getting an add when you left the bot, I was fine with that, but now forcing me to watch an ad while in the middle of a story is insane, it ruins the mode and feeling, also, I do doubt that the company reads reviews, and if so, please just revert the change of forcing me to watch an ad every time I exit a bot, don't ruin the mood. 2026-06-09.text: Please don't update or change it. It's actually so good imo. I just started using it and I'm already in love. I can write as much or as little as I want. I can add descriptions of the bot, my persona, ect. Most ai chats don't let me. My only issue is that the ads are pretty annoying. Even when i hit the exit button, they take me to whatever app no matter how many times I close out of it edit: I have to lower my rating. the ads are insane now. I can't even send two messages without ads popping up

2026-05-29.text: it's a good app it's just sometimes the bot played you character for you and there is ads while your talking to the bot. Sometimes the bot will not do what you say and it will control your character even if you don't want it too. The ads are really annoying like no one wants to pay about 10 dollars or more every month just to remove the ads. The pictures will not show sometimes and take forever to load, if you wanted to see a pictures you would have to watch a ad or pay a subscription.

2026-05-27.text: Out of all of them, this is definitely one of the best ones even for people who don't spend anything. The way everything is displayed is perfect and it's not overwhelming trying to figure out. The AI can get a little frustrating like when it forgets what you said 2 chat bubbles ago and it sucks if one of your favorites gets removed (though that's not the devs fault). Sometimes it speaks for your character and it's not what you would have said in the first place. Highly recommend this

2026-05-20.text: The majority of the stories are easy to adapt and continue, sometimes the AI gets a little weird and goes off on a tangent, all of its own, not all stories are translated to English. The reason I like this particular app is because for me, it's easy and if one of the stories gets weird, I simply drop it and find a new 1 overall. I like it and I believe the developers are going under good direction

2026-05-17.text: In the top 2 of all these ai apps. Free play is fun and not limited. Wish you'd give an introductory discount for a one month subscription because I'd love to see how much better the dialog can be. The dialog in free mode is outstanding, and chats are unlimited. Pics are weak, but if chatting is what you're after, this is the gold standard from what I've found having checked out over a dozen. Thanks, I will be subbing when money isn't so tight or you give that monthly discount.

2026-06-01.text: Pretty fun, though unfortunately has a lot of sexual stuff. This has to be the best AI chatting app I've ever used. comes with persona's and lots of memory. I love how in one chat, a friend and I were at a bakery and it changed the subject itself, by saying we needed to head to school. sometimes it makes the moves before I do which I think is a lot less tiring. the ads aren't too bad. most bots on this app are sexual though so I usually have to make my own, but its an overall amazing app.

2026-06-03.text: A wonderful app, great substitute for role playing with some limitations. The drawback is that at the end of the day it is AI you are conversing with so there is trouble with its memory. It will forget past events and can be extremely repetitive at times saying the same thing over and over again. I upgraded and there is a massive difference between free AI services and the paid subscription one. You also can generate photos in the chat but sometimes it can fail, looking weird or ridiculous.

2026-05-26.text: I think it's a good platform. The dialogue is very well written with pretty good details in the conversations between your AI and the user(me). One drawback is the user cannot delete a chat or character, if the user wants to perform that choice. The graphics and photos are far and few between. To this point playing, it's enjoyable to play.

2026-05-19.text: I used to really like this app, but at this point, it's more than 70% ads. I cannot send a message without an ad, and then it's three ads back-to-back. So I'm getting about two to three minutes of ads for every one minute of gameplay. And can you fix your indexing? If I'm looking for, as an example, mass effect RPG, I don't need a bunch of Irish mafia dark romances.

2026-06-12.text: You won't get the best experience unless you pay for it to be honest. There's this weird thing that pops up sometimes before the text like "user is implying blah blah" which is odd and ruins the immersion, and I've still noticed a few memory issues or some responses that completely confuse me. I'm paying for it, so it's a bit discouraging, but it's fun. There's a lot of loading issues lately and that shouldn't be happening if I'm paying for this.

Incredible Ai chat box, you can create your own characters the way you want them to be, and best of all, no limited amount of chats before they lock you out until you pay for a subscription, my only issue is that they sometimes change the wallpaper of some of the chats from the original to an AI generated version which can kill the mood on some of the chats but other than that, it is a perfect app.

great experience. the AI isn't perfect but it's very responsive and engaging. it does a pretty good job of remembering details, with a few mistakes. I like the option to choose from suggested prompts or freestyle the response. one minor annoyance is that I can't always see the entire suggested prompt, so I have to guess how it ends and it's not always what I want it to say when it's already submitted and it's too late to retract it. I'd like a suggested prompt to be editable before sending it.

Was getting better but now it is basically unplayable at night. Nothing loads and when an ad pops up then goes back, takes me right back to the first page instead of back to the Ai char I was on. After this last update, the game doesn't play right. Doesn't answer when I type something. Errors all the time. Answers in the wrong spot. Not a good update.
